missingSession: Login required: set ZEE_INDEX_SESSION_COOKIE (full cookie string, e.g. authjs.session-token=…) or ZEE_INDEX_SESSION_TOKEN (session value only). After signing in to Zee Index in your browser, copy the cookie from developer tools.
searchNeedOneCriterion: At least one of q, mimeType, modifiedTime, or minSize is required.

zee_health.title: Zee Index health
zee_health.description: Calls GET /api/health (public). No session. Set ZEE_INDEX_BASE_URL (default http://127.0.0.1:3000).

zee_public_config.title: Zee Index public config
zee_public_config.description: Calls GET /api/config/public (public). No session. Returns public app settings (no secrets).

zee_metadata_lookup.title: TMDB metadata by filename
zee_metadata_lookup.description: Calls GET /api/metadata?filename=… (public). Resolves media title from filename and queries TMDB. No session.

zee_whoami.title: Current Zee Index user
zee_whoami.description: Calls GET /api/auth/me. Requires session (ZEE_INDEX_SESSION_COOKIE or ZEE_INDEX_SESSION_TOKEN). Returns current user and role, same as the web app.

zee_files_list.title: List files in folder
zee_files_list.description: Calls GET /api/files. Requires session. Returns file list according to user permissions and folder rules (same as the web app).

zee_search.title: Search files (folder scope)
zee_search.description: Calls GET /api/search. Requires session. Search within a folder or with global filters (same query parameters as the web API).

zee_search_global.title: Search files (global tree)
zee_search_global.description: Calls GET /api/search/global. Requires session. Global search under the root tree (must be logged in).

schema.filename: File name or last path segment, e.g. Movie.2024.mkv
schema.folderId: Google Drive folder ID; omit to use the server-configured root
schema.q: Keyword (name or full text, depending on searchType)
